summary: Prove the vision-level goal before a run can report done
description: Prove the vision-level goal before a run can report done
acceptance: A run with active or blocked tasks cannot report done merely because open is empty
Final result audits vision success metrics hierarchy task states verification critic evidence and git state
Unproven vision completion returns an exact continuation or blocker status

evidence.summary: Goal completion hardened: blocked/active tasks prevent done; task budget with open work reports budget_exhausted; final audit requires valid linked contract, done-task evidence, declared success metrics, and passing project default verification. 37 pytest tests pass.
